title: Transit Galactic Shipping
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Transit Galactic Shipping''' was a company that specialized in hauling cargo across interstellar distances. The company was based out of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Cybloc XII/Legends|Cybloc XII]], where it operated several massive warehouses. In order to investigate the dealings of [[Dzym]], [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]], and their dealings with [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]], the [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Yarbolk Yemm]] shipped the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] through the network serviced by Transit Galactic Shipping.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
